title: Painting Cutting
description: Pick and choose paintings with the Stonecutter!
body:
![Stonecutter interfact, with a default painting item as the input and many of Minecraft's paintings appearing as the result](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/LOViQkxO/images/9014bbcd428b7d78bdeb6165182721b6913a37dc.png)

This pack allows you to use a Stonecutter to get all of the painting variants in item form, to avoid the trouble of having to place and break them until you get the one you want. You can even change the variant of any painting into another one later!

It also reintroduces the unused elemental paintings to survival! They can be chosen from the Stonecutter selection!

The Stonecutter was chosen because it lets you choose any of the possible item results without any additional cost, so even if the working table block feels awkward it's still probably the best option for quality-of-life gameplay.
